headline: Manu Kone — update
body: 🚨 Arsenal play down reports about talks at advanced state for Manu Kone. AS Roma midfielder not seen as a target, as @MatteMoretto reports. 📲➕ https://t.co/PNQFZ430rc https://t.co/RDHv9M616m
text:
🚨 Arsenal play down reports about talks at advanced state for Manu Kone.

AS Roma midfielder not seen as a target, as @MatteMoretto reports.

📲➕ https://t.co/PNQFZ430rc https://t.co/RDHv9M616m
